visual_description: A static, medium shot reveals a dimly lit, cluttered room filled with an assortment of dark, antique-looking objects. The space is filled with a sense of mystery and disarray. In the foreground, a table is covered with a patterned cloth, upon which sits a complex, spherical metal contraption and a tangled mass of old ropes. The background is a dense collection of what appear to be old chairs, shelves, and various mechanical parts, all shrouded in shadow. The overall color palette is dark and muted, with a greenish tint. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. The audio is filled with a slow, somber, and atmospheric musical score. The music is orchestral, with deep, resonant strings creating a melancholic and slightly ominous mood. It evokes a feeling of quiet suspense and contemplation, as if setting a scene of discovery in a dark, forgotten place. There is no dialogue or any other sound effects, allowing the atmospheric music to dominate the soundscape. The camera cuts to an extreme close-up of a young man's face. He has dark, messy hair and wears round, wire-rimmed glasses. His expression is one of intense concentration and concern
